The first one belongs to a class of methods

And the idea here is that if you can study
the statistics of your model, you can sort of learn
ways to represent values in a way that is matching the actual
learning, the actual distribution of weights in that model.

If you're using the ABS Max quantization I mentioned

So the idea here is that you basically store the outliers
separately, and you actually store them in full precision.
